_comment: App update manifest read by the Striv app on startup. Bump 'latest' to nudge users (dismissable); bump 'min' to force-update (blocking). Versions are versionName + build number, e.g. '1.0.0+9' — the build suffix IS compared, so include it for build-only bumps. Only point 'latest'/'min' at a version already available to testers (downloadable), never one still in review. 'url' is where the Update button sends the user.
